summary: Specified recurring Site Telemetry scheduler posture and added fixtures for disabled/default, due, blocked-by-capability, and successful dry-run paths. The posture records scheduler intent/result evidence, preserves capability/consent checks before transport, includes a Doctor freshness/failure summary fixture, and explicitly creates no live scheduled task.
residuals: This task intentionally remains specification-and-fixture only; substrate-specific scheduler registration requires a separate admitted runtime task.
No live scheduled task, network transport, inbox mutation, or remote finalization was created.
